title: Narra (disambiguation)
content:
'''Narra''' was the name of several individuals and a starship.

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Commander]] [[Arhul Narra]], leader of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)|Red Squaron]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*Commander [[Arhul Narra/Legends|Arhul Narra]], leader of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]
*[[Eretha Narra]], an [[Ebranite]]
*[[Narra Mesyne]], a [[Special Enforcement Officer/Legends|Special Enforcement Officer]]
*[[Narra (shuttle)|''Narra'']], a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Narra
}}
